# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

default:
  interruptible: true
  retry:
    max: 1
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN: "30 days"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\necho "Hello from built binary"\n' > dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - printf 'app:\n  env: "%s"\n' "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" > dist/config/app.yml
    - printf 'commit=%s\npipeline=%s\n' "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" > dist/config/build-info.txt
    - tar -czf dist/build.tar.gz -C dist bin config
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always
    paths:
      - dist/build.tar.gz
      - dist/bin/
      - dist/config/
    reports:
      dotenv: dist/config/build.env
  after_script:
    - printf 'BUILD_TARBALL=dist/build.tar.gz\n' > dist/config/build.env

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash tar
    - test -f dist/build.tar.gz
    - tar -tzf dist/build.tar.gz | grep -E '^bin/app$'
    - tar -xzf dist/build.tar.gz
    - ./bin/app

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
  environment:
    name: staging
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash tar
    - tar -xzf dist/build.tar.gz
    - echo "Deploying to staging with config:"
    - cat config/app.yml
    - ./bin/app

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
  environment:
    name: production
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash tar
    - tar -xzf dist/build.tar.gz
    - echo "Deploying to production with config:"
    - cat config/app.yml
    - ./bin/app
